daikin1:
Building C Mode: Cool (Summer) - Tue. 8:00–11:00 for 73 (Prime Timers’ Fit and Fall Proof) - Tue. 17:00–20:30 for 75 (Spanish Bible Study) - Thu. 7:00–15:10 for 73 (Classical Conversations) - Thu. 15:10–20:00 for 73 (Men’s Bible Study) - Fri. 8:00–11:00 for 73 (Prime Timers’ Fit and Fall Proof) - Sun. 8:30–12:30 for 73 (Church) - Sun. 15:00–18:00 for 73 (Trek) Mode: Heat (Winter) - Tue. 7:00–10:00 for 68 (Prime Timers’ Fit and Fall Proof) changed off from 11am to 10am per georgia - Thu. 6:00–15:10 for 68 (Classical Conversations) - Thu. 15:10–20:00 for 65/66 (Men’s Bible Study) reduced from 68 due to being to hot once. - Fri. 7:00–10:00 for 68 (Prime Timers’ Fit and Fall Proof) changed 11am-10am per georgia - Sun. 6:30–12:30 for 68 (Church) - Sun. 15:30–18:00 for 68 (Trek)
Moving T.B.D. - Tue. 17:00–20:30 for 67 (Spanish Bible Study)
